History across master + x41 + 4p3 rewritten via git filter-repo (dataroom->docuseal, DataRoom Sign->DocuSeal) and force-pushed with lease; 0 dataroom refs remain in any branch content or commit message on origin.

description: Idempotent boot seeding of Account/admin/API token/APP_URL/webhook from DOCUSEAL_* env; resilient to missing DB; replaces manual /setup for containerized deploys. Report 3.9

title: Completion watermark (timestamp + SHA-256 hash) on signed documents — DocuSign parity
description: Stamp every page of completed/signed documents with a bottom footer: Document ID + completion timestamp (UTC) + SHA-256 hash of the pre-stamp signed PDF bytes. On by default, account-config toggle. Design doc: docs/plans/2026-07-13-completion-watermark-design.md
close_reason: Feature complete on branch 4p3/completion-watermark (7cb6dd72, efc8529f, c2625e56): per-page ID+timestamp+SHA-256 footer, default-on account toggle, audit trail verification row. Visually verified (PDF renders + settings UI).

title: Licensing decision memo: Pro-feature reimplementation policy for this fork
description: Review AGPL-3.0 + LICENSE_ADDITIONAL_TERMS against each Tier 4 candidate (SSO, embedding, teams/RBAC, reminders, SMS, Stripe, bulk send, white-label, template APIs). Decide per-feature go/no-go, and the attribution posture (developbob attribution-when-personalized + wabolabs explicit fork-of attribution are the respectful patterns). Blocks all Tier 4 implementation issues. Report Tier 4 table.

comments.author: m
comments.text: Memo drafted and committed (d4cff5fd): docs/licensing/pro-feature-reimplementation-memo.md. Key finding: LICENSE_ADDITIONAL_TERMS is only a section 7(b) attribution-retention term (already satisfied by this fork); no anti-reimplementation clause exists. Per-feature go/hold recommendations included. Awaiting owner ratification before unblocking Tier 4 issues.
